html:
Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift

The Kinetoclasmic Field Expandinator is a structure that spawns after the player has given the Grainy Transmission the Encapsulated Celestial Revenant, which will reveal W.A.R.B.O.T..

After starting the Enlightened W.A.R.B.O.T. fight, the Kinetoclasmic Field Expandinators will activate and create a barrier that players on the inside cannot pass. Not even Wortox's soul hopping or Winona's Portasol can be used to escape. However, Wanda can still leave with her Backtrek Watch.


Trivia

  • In the first beta version of update, instead of creating an impassable barrier, the devices created a line that dealt electrical damage.
  • Woodie can transform to his Goose form to get through the barrier but cannot use the "take off" skill to leave.

Gallery

  • Kinetoclasmic Field Expandinator 90
  • Old Kinetoclasmic Field Expandinator Barier
  • Kinetoclasmic Field Expandinator Concept Art from Hostile Takeover update stream from Rhymes with Play.
  • Kinetoclasmic Field Expandinator Concept Animation from Hostile Takeover update stream from Rhymes with Play.
  • Kinetoclasmic Field Expandinator Concept Animation from Hostile Takeover update stream from Rhymes with Play.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

Kinetoclasmic Field Expandinator
On
Off
Miscellaneous
"wagpunk_cagewall"
Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift
“Wall or nothing!”
–Wilson
“Gives me claustrophobia.”
–Willow
“Nothing can contain mighty Wolfgang! Unless he allow it.”
–Wolfgang
“I guess we're not going anywhere.”
–Wendy
“PHYSICAL FIREWALL”
–WX-78
“It projects a force field tuned to repel physical matter and absorb kinetic impact. Simple.”
–Wickerbottom
“Whatever happened to good ol' fashioned wooden fence posts?”
–Woodie
“The blasted tinkerer wants to trap us like rats.”
–Maxwell
“Let nö söul flee the arena!”
–Wigfrid
“Now we can't cross the line?”
–Webber
“This will be a private party.”
–Warly
“No go!”
–Wormwood
“So, a fence post?”
–Winona
“Save the sass! None shall pass! Hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Me go wherever me want. Glurgh.”
–Wurt
“This will keep things contained. Yup, and us too, Woby!”
–Walter
“I don't like being stuck.”
–Wanda
The Kinetoclasmic Field Expandinator is a structure that spawns after the player has given the Grainy Transmission the Encapsulated Celestial Revenant, which will reveal W.A.R.B.O.T..
After starting the Enlightened W.A.R.B.O.T. fight, the Kinetoclasmic Field Expandinators will activate and create a barrier that players on the inside cannot pass. Not even Wortox's soul hopping or Winona's Portasol can be used to escape. However, Wanda can still leave with her Backtrek Watch.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
In the first beta version of update, instead of creating an impassable barrier, the devices created a line that dealt electrical damage.
Woodie can transform to his Goose form to get through the barrier but cannot use the "take off" skill to leave.

The '''Kinetoclasmic Field Expandinator''' is a structure that spawns after the player has given the Grainy Transmission the [[Phasmo-Encapsulator|Encapsulated]] [[Celestial Revenant]], which will reveal [[W.A.R.B.O.T.]]. 

After starting the [[Enlightened W.A.R.B.O.T.]] fight, the Kinetoclasmic Field Expandinators will activate and create a barrier that players on the inside cannot pass. Not even {{DSTL|Wortox}}'s soul hopping or {{DSTL|Winona}}'s Portasol can be used to escape. However, {{DSTL|Wanda}} can still leave with her [[Backtrek Watch]].
{{clear}}


== {{Trivia}} Trivia ==
* In the first beta version of update, instead of creating an impassable barrier, the devices created a line that dealt electrical damage.
* {{DSTL|Woodie}} can transform to his Goose form to get through the barrier but cannot use the "take off" skill to leave.
